---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Teste

Oi, isso é um teste!

```{r}
x <- 2:45
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| paged-print: false
library(tidyverse)
```

Fim do documento.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false
mtcars |> 
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = cyl, y = mpg))
```
